name: Chinese Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add the shrimp and cook for approximately 8 minutes or until they turn pink.
2. Remove the shrimp from the boiling water using tongs and rinse them quickly in cold water. Shell and de-vein the shrimp.
3. In a heat-proof bowl, combine the shrimp, soy sauce, minced garlic, sliced carrot, celery, snow peas, and black pepper.
4. Transfer the mixture to a steamer basket lined with parchment paper and steam over boiling water for approximately 25 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
